title: YLAB Christmas Activity Book Set for Kids – Colouring, Sticker & Puzzle Books with Pencils – Festive Gift for Children Age 3-10 – Travel Activity Pack in Carry Case
features: ✨ 🎄 FESTIVE FUN ON THE GO Keep little ones entertained during the holidays with this all-in-one Christmas activity book set – perfect for travel, quiet time, parties or festive fun at home.
🖍️ 📚 4 BOOKS + COLOURING PENCILS INCLUDED This value-packed set contains 2 colouring books, 1 activity book (puzzles, mazes, spot-the-difference), 1 sticker book, and 6 colouring pencils.
🎁 🎅 PERFECT CHRISTMAS GIFT FOR KIDS Ideal for Christmas Eve boxes, stockings, party bags or classroom treats. A fun and creative present for boys and girls aged 3–10.
🧠 🧩 ENCOURAGES CREATIVITY & LEARNING Helps develop fine motor skills, creativity and focus through engaging festive-themed activities – hours of screen-free entertainment!
🌍 ♻️ ECO-FRIENDLY & RECYCLABLE MATERIALS Made from FSC MIX paper/card and recycled materials. Designed with sustainability in mind and widely recyclable.
description: Make this Christmas extra magical with the 🎁 YLAB Christmas Activity Book Set for Kids – a cheerful bundle of creative fun designed to keep children engaged and entertained for hours! 🖍️✨ This all-in-one set includes: 📘 2 Christmas Colouring Books 📗 1 Puzzle & Activity Book (with mazes, spot-the-difference and more) 📙 1 Sticker Book ✏️ 6 Colouring Pencils All beautifully packaged in a festive red ❄️ carry case with a handle – perfect for Christmas travel, days at home, or popping into a Christmas Eve box or 🎅 stocking filler ! Children aged 3 to 10 will love colouring in jolly characters like Santa 🎅, reindeer 🦌, snowmen ⛄ and elves 🧝 , while developing creativity, fine motor skills, and concentration – all without screen time! 📵🧠 🌍 Eco-friendly too! Made from FSC MIX certified and recycled paper/card – this product is widely recyclable and created with the planet in mind. ♻️💚 Whether you’re looking for a travel activity set, a party bag filler, or a fun and thoughtful gift – this Christmas activity pack is a 🎄 must-have for festive fun!
